current_milestone: Phase G complete — all seven arenas (Phase-1 Gates 1-7) + 5 arena gates green
notes: All Phase-G sub-phases done. G.1 runtime collection + G.2 Commons + G.3 Wall + G.4 Gauntlet + G.5 Bazaar + G.6 Throne. throne_integration demo proves one EngineState supports subscribe/drain/consensus, adversarial trust filtering, cloneState branching, four-stage escrow — simultaneously — without audit-chain corruption. Vitest 120/120 green. Gates: 7 Phase-1 + commons + wall + gauntlet + bazaar + throne = 12 total, all recorded in ops/data/gates.json. Five-tool MCP public API unchanged throughout Phase G; only the CLI gained the replay subcommand. Phase-1 judge path (Gate 7) re-verified on every CI run.
